Examine your HEART - motives , intention, etc..
The biggest enemy is YOURSELF !!

What are your 3 TOP visions and missions in life? YOURS!
Whatever you do right now, how effective is it to achieve those???
What can be improved?
What can you do to make YOURSELF and OTHERS better than yesterday?
Whatever your goals are, ARE YOU EQUIPPED, PREPARED(how??), and HAVE YOU LEARNED all the required skills??

Time to sit back and think: How much PERCENT of DAILY action is due to :
1. revenge
2. rant out or find an outlet of almost exploding emotions of anger /hatred/ frustrations
3. do it because your good friends are doing it. ( Test: will you do it if it is only YOU alone?)
4. feel of excitement, similar to G.T.A. or LoL.
5. some or all of above.

Hatred breeds hatred. Unfortunately it never ends....
When emotion takes over, unwanted and irrecoverable consequences may happen !! CAN YOU TRULY AFFORD those consequences?

Are you sure you don't need any support from other countries?
On videos, even they may understand your anger, there is level of maximum tolerance. Beyond that, some people may link some of the actions with non-acceptable riot behavior. Hopefully it will NOT escalate and let other view it as terrorist behavior. Can you or HK afford that type of conclusion to happen?

I guess CCP is happiest for now since they are superb in "divide and rule". How nice it it seeing popos (HK people mostly) fighting with protestors ( HK people) without costing them to send out a soldier or penny? At the end, maybe both side lose!! Why? Increasing hatred forms along with lots of casualties and loss of top young men on years of freedom. Low cost , HIGH IMPACT !!! Good deal for CCP.

From that perspective, are all HK people become losers? When everybody keeps fighting ( popos vs protestors), do all HK people, including popos, and officials, fall well into their sophisticated trap?

LIVE YOUR LIFE TO THE FULLEST !!!
